content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4

## Summary

No amendments. `git diff` on the working tree was empty, so I reviewed the committed delta in `origin/master..HEAD`, focusing on `src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/contexts/milestone_record/model.rs`, and `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs`. The canonical journal-detail struct reuse, runless-to-named completion backfill, and snapshot-based `plan_hash` population all look correct, and targeted regression coverage passed (`cargo test milestone_record::service::tests::` and `cargo test adapters::fs::tests::`).

## Amendments

None.
